subject: Re: Offer — Senior Frontend Engineer at Vectrix Labs

messages.subject: Offer — Senior Frontend Engineer at Vectrix Labs
messages.body:
Hi Derek,

We're thrilled to extend an offer for the Senior Frontend Engineer role at Vectrix Labs.

Offer details:
- Base salary: $145,000/year
- Equity: 0.18% (75,000 options, 4-year vest, 1-year cliff, $0.04 exercise price)
- Start date: February 3, 2026 (flexible)
- Full benefits per the attached summary

Please review the attached offer letter. We'd love to have your decision by January 24.

— Nina Kowalski
Ops & People, Vectrix Labs

messages.subject: Re: Offer — Senior Frontend Engineer at Vectrix Labs
messages.body:
Hi Nina,

Thank you so much for the offer and for the time the team spent with me. I have a lot of respect for what Marcus and the team are building.

Unfortunately, I'm going to have to decline. I've accepted an offer elsewhere — the comp was closer to my target ($160K base) and the role is fully remote without any in-person expectations.

I hope our paths cross again. Genuinely rooting for Vectrix.

— Derek

messages.subject: Derek Huang declined — we need to revisit the band
messages.body:
Priya,

Derek declined. He said comp was the issue — $145K wasn't close enough to his target and he got $160K elsewhere.

This is the second candidate in two months where we've lost at offer stage on comp. I think we need to move the band to $145K–$165K and be willing to go to $158–$165K for strong candidates. At $145K we're fighting with Series B companies on price and losing.

Amanda at TalentBridge told me the current market rate for this role in SF is $155K–$170K. We're at the bottom of that range.

Can we get this approved so we can repost and move on? I want Anya Chen to be our next candidate — she's in TalentBridge's pipeline and her background is exactly what we need.

— Marcus

messages.subject: Re: Derek Huang declined — we need to revisit the band
messages.body:
Approved. New band: $145K–$165K. We can go to $160K without another approval cycle; above $160K ping me first.

Nina — please update the JD and the TalentBridge brief. Marcus — reach out to Amanda today about Anya Chen.

— P
